title: WOMEN'S CARE - 211info
text: WOMEN'S CARE AT THE TEN COBURG WOMEN'S CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a range of women's health services across the life span. Offers obstetrics and gynecology services, including prenatal care and lactation services and reproduction. 10 Coburg Road Suite 100 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 868-9700 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 868-9700 Main phone (541) 868-9844 FAX Main phone (541) 868-9700 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: OHP, private insurance, payment plans DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for payment plans. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs Midwifery Obstetrics/Gynecology Prenatal Care Women's Health Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
